title: Async Context, Abort Signals, Deadlines, and Cleanup · Type Recall
summary: A delayed operations handoff reconstructs async context, abort signals, deadlines, and cleanup from bounded code and request evidence, challenges one misconception, and revises the request context, budget, cancellation, and cleanup ledger. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for request context, budget, cancellation, and cleanup ledger after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use AsyncLocalStorage run, enterWith limits, snapshot, name, and bounded request metadata without treating context as authorization.
Compose client disconnect, service deadline, dependency timeout, and shutdown with AbortSignal.timeout and AbortSignal.any while preserving the first cause.
Allocate request time among queueing, dependencies, response, and cleanup with monotonic evidence and no negative or expanding child budgets.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Node and Express server Async Local Storage Scope · changed case · Review Async Local Storage Scope
steps.instruction:
review case — A review team handles case 5848 in a multi-tenant case service with a bounded PostgreSQL pool. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to reserve cleanup time and combine client abort with one dependency budget; show recovery after the overload input is removed; then abort during a dependency phase and preserve cleanup plus response ownership. Browser code models pure decisions only. Node, Express, listener, TLS, PostgreSQL, proxy, worker, load, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Use AsyncLocalStorage run, enterWith limits, snapshot, name, and bounded request metadata without treating context as authorization.
